name: Glass Reed Diffuser Coconut Water and Orchid 3.38 fl oz - Threshold™
description:
Uplift your space with the Glass Reed Diffuser Coconut Water and Orchid 3.4 fl oz from Threshold™. Infused with the refreshing vibe of coconut water and hints of orchid, this 3.4 fl oz diffuser creates a serene, spa-like atmosphere. The reed diffuser design allows for a continuous, flameless fragrance experience, making it a stylish and effortless way to refresh any room in an instant.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you™
